changeSet.author: nour
changeSet.sql:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS notification_jobs ( id BIGINT GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY PRIMARY KEY, title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, body TEXT NOT NULL, image_url VARCHAR(1024), data JSONB, status VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'PENDING', target_type VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'ALL', total_users INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, processed_users INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, cursor_id BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, scheduled_at TIMESTAMPTZ, started_at TIMESTAMPTZ, completed_at TIMESTAMPTZ, is_deleted BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE, deleted_at TIMESTAMPTZ, deleted_by VARCHAR(255), created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(), updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(), created_by VARCHAR(255), updated_by VARCHAR(255) );
COMMENT ON TABLE notification_jobs IS 'Fan-out controller — one record per broadcast notification campaign'; COMMENT ON COLUMN notification_jobs.cursor_id IS 'Last user_profile.id processed; serves as cursor for batch-based fan-out iteration'; COMMENT ON COLUMN notification_jobs.status IS 'PENDING | IN_PROGRESS | COMPLETED | FAILED | CANCELLED'; COMMENT ON COLUMN notification_jobs.target_type IS 'ALL — fan-out to all active users'; COMMENT ON COLUMN notification_jobs.data IS 'Optional JSON key-value map forwarded as FCM data payload';
